---
title: "Get BlueTopo in 60 Seconds"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Get BlueTopo in 60 Seconds}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(bluertopo)
library(terra)

aoi <- vect("my_area.gpkg")
bathy <- bluertopo(aoi)
```

`bluertopo()` discovers the current NOAA BlueTopo tile scheme, selects
intersecting source tiles, downloads verified original assets into the package
cache, and returns file-backed `terra` objects.
